emotionalMeaning: Used in extreme anger or intense arguments to insult someone
exampleSentence: Usa mat bula wo bohot bada madarchod insaan hai.

emotionalMeaning: Commonly used in casual street banter or arguments to dismiss someone or something
Used to describe someone who is sneaky or acts smart to exploit situations
exampleSentence: Zyada chant mat ban sab pata hai mujhe.

emotionalMeaning: Commonly used as an exclamation of shock / anger or casually between close friends
Used to express excitement or praise for something exceptionally good
exampleSentence: Arey kya gandfaad performance thi yaar uski!

emotionalMeaning: Used to mock someone's intelligence or highlight their gullible nature
exampleSentence: Tu bilkul chutiya hai kya jo uski baaton mein aa gaya?

emotionalMeaning: A very mild abuse or exclamation used casually in friendly irritation
exampleSentence: Saala phir se gaadi kharab ho gayi.

emotionalMeaning: Can be used as an insult for a cheat or playfully for a friend who is overly smart
exampleSentence: Wo harami hai chupke se saare paise le gaya.
